title: What should I ask Martha Nussbaum?
subtitle: Yes, I will be doing a Conversation with her. Most of all focusing on her recent book The Republic of Love: Opera and Political Freedom. So what should I ask her? The post What should I ask Martha Nussbaum? appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION .
contentHtml:
Yes, I will be doing a Conversation with her.  Most of all focusing on her recent book The Republic of Love: Opera and Political Freedom.

So what should I ask her?
